global.description: The ad features a vibrant blue background with abstract shapes and clear promotional text.
global.main_message: Promoting the MoonScreen service with a call to action.

elements.label: Solid blue background
elements.description: A solid blue background fills the entire canvas, providing a vibrant base for the other elements.

elements.label: Circular and rectangular shapes
elements.description: A large circular shape and a rectangular shape are centered, both in a lighter blue shade, creating a modern abstract design.

elements.label: Overlapping shapes
elements.description: Another circular shape overlaps with the rectangular shape, adding depth and interest to the composition.

elements.label: Smaller rectangle
elements.description: A smaller rectangle is positioned within the larger shapes, maintaining a cohesive color scheme.

elements.label: Small circular element
elements.description: A small circular element is placed near the center, contributing to the abstract design.

elements.label: Additional overlapping shape
elements.description: Another overlapping shape is present, enhancing the layered effect of the design.

elements.label: Smaller circular shape
elements.description: A smaller circular shape is positioned slightly off-center, adding visual variety.

elements.label: Decorative circle
elements.description: A decorative circle is placed towards the bottom, adding a playful touch to the overall design.

elements.label: Main promotional text
elements.description: The text 'Binge starts now Cancel anytime' is prominently displayed in a bold, clear font at the bottom of the ad.

elements.label: MoonScreen logo
elements.description: The 'MoonScreen' logo is positioned at the top, featuring a modern font that stands out against the background.

elements.label: Call to action button
elements.description: The 'Watch now' button is located at the bottom, designed as a prominent clickable element with a contrasting color.

elements.label: UGC label
elements.description: The 'UGC' label is placed at the top left, indicating user-generated content in a small font.

embedding_texts.global_text: unknown, unknown, native, modern abstract with bold text, main promotional text and call to action.
embedding_texts.layout_text: The logo is at the top, the main text is centered, and the call to action is at the bottom.
embedding_texts.ocr_text: Binge starts now, Cancel anytime, MoonScreen, Watch now, UGC
